---
title: "About"
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center; padding: 20px 0 10px 0;">
  <img src="images/me_and_meko.png" 
       alt="Carina and Meko" 
       style="width: 400px; height: 400px; object-fit: cover; 
              border-radius: 12px;
              box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(90,154,90,0.15);"/>
</div>
```

## About Me

Hi there! Thank you for visiting my page, where I document my learning 
journey through **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications** as part of 
my **Master of IT in Business** programme at **Singapore Management 
University (SMU)**. I hope your journey is as fulfilling as mine!

I'm Carina — passionate about turning raw data into clear, meaningful 
stories through the power of visualisation. When I'm not exploring data, 
you'll find me spending time with my cats, 
**Meko** and **Zeko**, or discovering new cafes around Singapore ☕

Special thanks to **Prof. Kam Tin Seong** for his dedication, patience, 
and generosity in sharing his knowledge. 🙏


## About This Course

The course draws from research and practice across **Data Visualisation**, **Human-Computer Interaction**, **Data Analytics**, and **Usability Engineering**. It equips students with the skills to:

- Interact with data from various sources and formats using visual analytics techniques
- Build interactive and reproducible data visualisation applications
- Apply a layered grammar of graphics to communicate data insights effectively
- Use tools such as **R**, **ggplot2**, **Quarto**, and **Shiny** to create compelling visual narratives

This portfolio documents my learning journey through the hands-on exercises, in-class activities, and take-home projects assigned throughout the course.

---
